arts.ttl: Plymouth to host Liverpool in FA Cup fourth round
arts.sum: Championship side Plymouth Argyle are drawn at home to eight-time winners Liverpool in the FA Cup fourth round.

arts.ttl: U’s unsuccessful in appeal against Tyler Goodrham red card
arts.sum: OXFORD United have been unsuccessful in their appeal against Tyler Goodrham’s red card in the Emirates FA Cup at the weekend.

arts.ttl: 2024/25 FA Cup fourth round draw: Man Utd draw Leicester; Liverpool face Plymouth
arts.sum: The 16 fourth-round fixtures are set to be dotted across the weekend of Saturday, 8 February . Nevertheless, FA Cup referees won't be able to call upon the backing of VAR for the fourth round.

arts.ttl: Player signs for promotion-chasing club just days after Plymouth Argyle release
arts.sum: Turkish side Fatih Karagumruk have confirmed the signing of Andre Gray just days after the forward was released by Plymouth Argyle. The former Burnley and QPR man spent three months this season with the Championship side, but will now be playing in the Turkish second tier.
